lines: Take good care of that sword, son. It's a fine blade.
It's yours, then. A young monkey like you shouldn't be walking around without a proper blade. Call it a gift.
> Thank you! Thank you so much!
> My father sent me. He said you needed help?
Ah, Korato! Yes. I've been working on this new sword, but my old bones are aching.
I need someone to test its balance. Take it, give it a few swings.
